name: Glorgoloch the Destroyer
location: Glorgoloch the Destroyer in Arena District, Tel Var lockbox merchant

bonuses.stat:
While in combat, each second you stand still grants you a stack of Flesh Fortress, up to 10 stacks. Each stack increases your Armor by 8-380 and your Critical Resistance by 0-38. Each second you move removes a stack of Flesh Fortress. Exiting combat removes all stacks of Flesh Fortress.

Using charge and teleport abilities do not remove stacks of Flesh Fortress.
